sourcesContent:
# tab-indented file: indentation is the literal prefix "\t" per level.
# prefix- and width-based indentation models agree on consistent
# tab-only files, so every corpus layer applies.
double = (x) ->
	x * 2

label = ""
n = 42
if n > 10
	if n > 100
		label = "huge"
	else
		label = "big"
else
	label = "small"

total = 0
for v in [1, 20, 300]
	total += double v

msg = "#{label}: #{total}"

# implicit objects under tab indentation (literal-prefix layout)
conf =
	name: "rip"
	size: total
who = name: "tab", deep: inner: 1
